issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling for webhook sending or consumer portal operations, missing edge case guidance.
The skill assumes a Node.js/TypeScript environment, limiting compatibility with other AI agent platforms.

scenarios.name: Register customer and send filtered order webhooks via Svix
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the documented Svix SDK trio application.create + endpoint.create with filterTypes + message.create; baseline reinvents delivery with axios and a custom retry queue.

scenarios.name: Verify Svix signatures and generate self-service portal link
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses svix Webhook.verify with the svix-id/timestamp/signature header triple and authentication.appPortalAccess for the portal; baseline rolls custom HMAC and a hand-built dashboard.
